prompt: Create a 1500x500 horizontal cover. On the left, place a realistic workbench, and on the right: "One person can finish the work of a whole small team"
promptEn: Create a 1500x500 horizontal cover. On the left, place a realistic workbench, and on the right: "One person can finish the work of a whole small team"
promptZh: 创建一个 1500x500 的横向封面。左侧放置一个 写实风格工作台，右侧放置："一人即可完成整个小团队的工作量"
